description: Standalone REST API service with auth, docs, and tests

typical_tasks.description: Design API schema — define all endpoints, request/response shapes, error codes, auth strategy. Output: OpenAPI spec (openapi.yaml).
Design database schema for the API — tables, indexes, relationships. Output: SQL migration files.
Implement authentication middleware — API key or JWT validation, rate limiting, request logging.
Implement all API endpoints per the OpenAPI spec from T1. Use the database schema from T2.
Write API tests — happy path, error cases, auth rejection, rate limit enforcement. Cover all endpoints from T4.
Generate API documentation — README with quickstart, endpoint reference from OpenAPI spec, code examples in curl and Python.
